info.title: OmniWA Public REST API
info.description: Public REST and SSE contract for the implemented OmniWA platform route surface. This contract documents public resources only; Application command and query names remain internal.

tags.name: Metrics
tags.description: Operational metric snapshots and queue health.

tags.name: Instances
tags.description: WhatsApp instance lifecycle and safe session visibility.

tags.name: Messages
tags.description: Outbound message submission and message status resources.

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Media registration and media status resources.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Safe product event log and realtime stream resources.

post.description: Partial route. Reconnect is scheduler-owned in the current Application catalog and is not exposed through the public API boundary.

get.description: List session projection rows for one instance.
List message timeline projection rows for one instance.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional webhook delivery status filter, for example dead_letter.

parameters.name: webhookId
parameters.description: Optional safe webhook subscription identifier filter.

parameters.name: failureCategory
parameters.description: Optional safe failure category filter for operator remediation views.

parameters.name: reasonCode
parameters.description: Optional safe dead-letter reason code filter for operator remediation views.

post.description: Queue controlled redrive operations for explicitly selected dead-lettered webhook deliveries. Requires an elevated key and idempotency-key.
Partial route. Provider capability refresh is scheduler-owned in the current Application catalog and is not exposed through the public API boundary.

get.description: Polling fallback for clients that cannot use the SSE event stream.
Read-only Server-Sent Events stream. Emits safe redacted event envelopes only; WebSocket remains deferred.

200.description: SSE stream of safe event envelopes.

get.description: List group projection rows for one instance.

post.summary: Refresh group list for an instance
post.description: Request provider-backed group discovery behind capability checks.

patch.description: Request subject or description update behind provider capability checks.

post.description: Request member addition behind provider capability checks.
Send text into a group without exposing internal command names.

delete.description: Request member removal behind provider capability checks.

post.description: Request member promotion behind provider capability checks.
Request member demotion behind provider capability checks.
Request invite link refresh behind provider capability checks.

get.description: List chat navigation projection rows scoped to one instance.
List redaction-safe contact projection rows scoped to one instance.
List label organization projection rows scoped to one instance.
Lists safe API key lifecycle records. Plaintext keys and keyHash values are never returned.

post.description: Creates a hashed API key lifecycle record. The provided key is write-only and is not returned.
Revokes the current key and creates a safe replacement record. Plaintext key material is write-only.

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key provisioned outside source code. MVP supports API, admin, and monitoring key kinds through runtime configuration.

XRequestIdHeader.name: x-request-id
XRequestIdHeader.description: Optional request identifier supplied by the client.

XCorrelationIdHeader.name: x-correlation-id
XCorrelationIdHeader.description: Optional correlation identifier for distributed tracing.

XTraceIdHeader.name: x-trace-id
XTraceIdHeader.description: Optional trace identifier propagated through observability boundaries.

IdempotencyKeyHeader.name: idempotency-key
IdempotencyKeyHeader.description: Stable client key for retry-safe command requests.

Cursor.name: cursor
Cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor. Clients must not parse cursor contents.

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Requested page size. Runtime may cap the effective limit.

Sort.name: sort
Sort.description: Resource-specific sort expression. Unsupported fields must be rejected safely.

LastEventIdHeader.name: Last-Event-ID
LastEventIdHeader.description: Optional SSE resume cursor from the last received event id.

ApiKeyId.name: keyId
ApiKeyId.description: Safe API key identifier. This is not the API key secret or hash.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated identity is not allowed to access this boundary.

NotFound.description: Route or resource was not found.

Conflict.description: Request conflicts with current resource state.

Unprocessable.description: Business or policy rule rejected the request.

NotImplemented.description: Route is reserved but not currently implemented by a safe read model or public boundary.

error.message: The requested resource requires a read projection that is not available yet.

ServiceUnavailable.description: Runtime dependency or dispatcher is unavailable.

InternalError.description: Unexpected internal error. Response must not expose sensitive implementation details.

to.description: Opaque recipient reference. It must not expose raw phone numbers or provider-native payloads.
Opaque recipient reference. It must not expose raw phone numbers or provider-native payloads.

limit.description: Effective runtime page size after server-side capping.

sort.description: Accepted whitelisted sort expression for this resource.

search.description: Accepted safe search term for this resource.

filters.description: Accepted whitelisted filter fields for this resource.

PublicData.description: Public resource data returned by the Application boundary. It must not include secrets, raw provider payloads, raw phone numbers, raw JIDs, or session material.

ApiKeyResource.description: Safe API key lifecycle resource. It never exposes plaintext key material or keyHash values.
